name: literature-assistant-toolbox
description: Local Literature Assistant MCP toolbox for Claude Desktop.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the local Literature Assistant backend through a stdio MCP server. It exposes literature search, material reads, annotation export, and safe source-inspection tools without storing provider keys in the extension.

tools.name: literature.search_literature
tools.description: Search local Literature Assistant project chunks.

tools.name: literature.ingest_then_search
tools.description: Ingest pending project files before searching.

tools.name: source.read_file
tools.description: Read safe Literature Assistant source files.

tools.name: source.inspect_routes
tools.description: Inspect FastAPI route decorators without importing backend modules.

tools.name: workflow.run_json_workflow
tools.description: Run a bounded JSON workflow through registered MCP tools.

tools.name: workflow.run_python_sandbox
tools.description: Run bounded pure-Python data shaping in an experimental local sandbox.

tools.name: literature.ocr_material
tools.description: Prepare OCR/page-image artifacts for a material.

tools.name: literature.prepare_visual_review
tools.description: Prepare retrieval and figure/table evidence for visual review.

tools.name: literature.translate_pack
tools.description: Generate a bounded translation pack through backend-managed model calls.

tools.name: artifact.write_markdown
tools.description: Write Markdown workflow artifacts under the local agent workspace.

backend_base_url.title: Literature Assistant backend URL
backend_base_url.description: Local backend URL used by the MCP server.

enable_experimental_tools.title: Enable experimental MCP tools
enable_experimental_tools.description: Set to 1 to enable OCR, visual review, translation packs, and the bounded Python sandbox.
